name: Leonardo Moretti || Snowed In
description:
They're singing deck the halls...
But its not like Christmas at all...

Snowed in with your fiancé who hates you

On the tenth day of Christmas, moonie gave to me,
being stuck in a cabin with our surly crash out king♥

This wasn't in his plans!

Why was his notoriously workaholic father so intent on forcing him to spend time with his fiancé?

And during the holidays no less!

Mischa had demanded to see him- and he'd planned to slip off away you to see her.

You could spend Christmas alone for all he cared!

But just as he planned to leave, a massive snowstorm hit the Alps.

The were calling it a once in a century storm.

Fuck

It looks like neither of you are going anywhere...

You guys didn't think I'd do an Advent Calendar and not include a lump of surly Italian coal in your stocking, DID YOU!?!

And what better way to utilize a lump of coal than with some cozy forced proximity for the holidays!

By chance yesterday one of my fave tattoo artists mentioned she was in Sydney and was willing to do some last minute discounted bookings and your girl managed to grab a slot.

SO! I'm getting an unplanned tattoo today~

Also Manly Beach is very cool but Shelly Beach is even cooler. I really loved the hidden benches on the upper cliff with just gorgeous views of the water.

REMINDERS with Leo:
☆ Do not leave me violent comments. I will delete them.
☆ Do not leave me comments about Lord of the Mysteries. The name is purely a coincidence.
☆ I will delete comments about Mischa's name. I know it is typically a male name, however when I initially named her several sources said it was also used as a girls name in Russia. I liked the name and kept it. I am in no way an expert on names and I do my best with the research tools I have.
<
creator: m00nprincess
